auto_speedtest.name: auto_speedtest
auto_speedtest.markdown_description: Periodic automated internet speed test settings.
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: cron_expr
attributes.markdown_description: Cron expression controlling when the speed test runs (e.g. `0 * * * *`).

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Whether periodic automated speed tests are enabled.

country.name: country
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

doh.name: doh
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: custom_servers
attributes.markdown_description: Custom DNS servers specified via DNS stamp.

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Enable this custom server. Defaults to true.

attributes.name: sdns_stamp
attributes.markdown_description: DNS stamp (sdns://) for the custom resolver.

attributes.name: server_name
attributes.markdown_description: Human-readable name for this custom server.

attributes.name: server_names
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: state
attributes.markdown_description: Encrypted DNS state: off, auto, manual, or custom.

dpi.name: dpi
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

igmp_snooping.name: igmp_snooping
igmp_snooping.markdown_description: Site-level IGMP snooping setting. On UniFi Network 10.3.x+ the effective IGMP snooping toggle lives here rather than on each network. Advanced querier/flood options configured in the UI are preserved across updates.

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Whether IGMP snooping is enabled for the site.

attributes.name: network_ids
attributes.markdown_description: IDs of the networks IGMP snooping applies to.
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

ips.name: ips
ips.markdown_description: Intrusion Prevention System (IPS/IDS) and threat management settings. Basic IDS/IPS uses the built-in Emerging Threats ruleset and is free. A UniFi CyberSecure subscription adds enhanced threat intelligence from Proofpoint and Cloudflare on top of the base ruleset.
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: advanced_filtering_preference
attributes.markdown_description: Advanced filtering mode: manual or disabled.

attributes.name: content_filtering_blocking_page_enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Show a blocking page when content filtering blocks a request.

attributes.name: enabled_categories
attributes.markdown_description: Emerging Threats ruleset categories to enable (e.g. "emerging-malware", "tor", "phishing").
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: enabled_networks
attributes.markdown_description: Network IDs to apply IPS inspection to.
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: ip_address
attributes.markdown_description: IP address to use as a honeypot.

attributes.name: network_id
attributes.markdown_description: Network ID this honeypot IP belongs to.

attributes.name: honeypot_enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Enable honeypot to detect internal port scans.

attributes.name: ips_mode
attributes.markdown_description: IPS operating mode: ids (detect only), ips (detect and block), ipsInline, or disabled.

attributes.name: memory_optimized
attributes.markdown_description: Use memory-optimized IPS ruleset (reduced rule set for low-memory devices).

attributes.name: suppression_alerts
attributes.markdown_description: IPS signature alert suppression entries — silence specific signatures or categories.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.markdown_description: Match direction: both, src, or dest.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.markdown_description: Match mode: ip, subnet, or network.

attributes.name: value
attributes.markdown_description: IP address, CIDR subnet, or network ID to match.

attributes.name: type
attributes.markdown_description: Suppression type: `all` (everywhere) or `track` (only the tracked sources/destinations).

attributes.name: suppression_whitelist
attributes.markdown_description: IPS suppression whitelist entries — sources/destinations to exclude from inspection.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.markdown_description: Match direction: both, src, or dest.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.markdown_description: Match mode: ip, subnet, or network.

attributes.name: value
attributes.markdown_description: IP address, CIDR subnet, or network ID to whitelist.

lcm.name: lcm
lcm.markdown_description: LCD/display (LCM) settings for devices with a screen.
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Whether the device display is enabled.

attributes.name: idle_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: Seconds of inactivity before the display turns off (10-3600).

attributes.name: touch_event
attributes.markdown_description: Whether touch events on the display are enabled.

mgmt.name: mgmt
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: auto_upgrade_hour
attributes.markdown_description: Hour of day (0-23) for automatic firmware upgrades.

attributes.name: ssh_auth_password_enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Allow SSH password authentication (in addition to keys).

attributes.name: type
attributes.markdown_description: Type of SSH key, e.g. ssh-rsa.

attributes.name: ssh_password
attributes.markdown_description: SSH password for device access. Sensitive — the controller stores only a hash, so this value is kept from configuration and not read back.

network_optimization.name: network_optimization
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: enabled
attributes.markdown_description: Whether automated network optimization is enabled.

ntp.name: ntp
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: interim_update_interval
attributes.markdown_description: Interim update interval, as a Go duration string (e.g. `1h`, `3600s`).

attributes.name: secret
validators: string length must be between 1 and 48
must not contain backslashes, spaces, single quotes, or double quotes

syslog.name: syslog
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: contents
plan_modifiers: Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.

attributes.name: this_controller_encrypted_only
attributes.markdown_description: Only send this controller's logs over an encrypted channel.

attributes.name: geo_ip_filtering_block
attributes.markdown_description: Geo IP filtering action: block or allow.

attributes.name: geo_ip_filtering_countries
attributes.markdown_description: Comma-separated list of country codes for geo IP filtering.

attributes.name: geo_ip_filtering_traffic_direction
attributes.markdown_description: Geo IP filtering traffic direction: both, ingress, or egress.

attributes.name: icmp_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: ICMP connection timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `30s`, `1m`).

attributes.name: mss_clamp
attributes.markdown_description: MSS clamping mode: auto, custom, or disabled.

attributes.name: offload_l2_blocking
attributes.markdown_description: Enable hardware offload for L2 blocking.

attributes.name: other_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: Other connections timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `600s`, `10m`).

attributes.name: tcp_close_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP close timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `10s`).

attributes.name: tcp_close_wait_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP close wait timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `60s`, `1m`).

attributes.name: tcp_established_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP established connection timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `7440s`, `2h4m`).

attributes.name: tcp_fin_wait_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP fin wait timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `120s`, `2m`).

attributes.name: tcp_last_ack_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP last ACK timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `30s`).

attributes.name: tcp_syn_recv_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP SYN received timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `60s`, `1m`).

attributes.name: tcp_syn_sent_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP SYN sent timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `120s`, `2m`).

attributes.name: tcp_time_wait_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: TCP time wait timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `120s`, `2m`).

attributes.name: timeout_setting_preference
attributes.markdown_description: Timeout setting preference: auto or manual.

attributes.name: udp_other_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: UDP other timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `30s`).

attributes.name: udp_stream_timeout
attributes.markdown_description: UDP stream timeout, as a Go duration string (e.g. `180s`, `3m`).
